info.name: Jalan Jenis Perkerasan Module
info.description: API collection for Jalan Jenis Perkerasan (Road Pavement Type) module - Master data for pavement types (Lentur/Kaku)

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Jalan Jenis Perkerasan (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan jenis perkerasan with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "jenis": "Lentur",
      "createdAt": "...",
      "updatedAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "amount": 10,
  "total": 2,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Jalan Jenis Perkerasan (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan jenis perkerasan without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Get single jalan jenis perkerasan detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "jenis": "Lentur",
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new jalan jenis perkerasan.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "jenis": "string" // Required - Nama jenis perkerasan
}
```

**Common Values**:
- "Lentur" (Flexible/Aspal)
- "Kaku" (Rigid/Beton)

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Perkerasan created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "Lentur",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create jenis perkerasan Kaku (Rigid/Concrete pavement).

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing jalan jenis perkerasan.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,      // Required - ID to update
  "jenis": string    // Optional - New jenis name
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Perkerasan updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "jenis": "Lentur (Updated)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Soft delete jalan jenis perkerasan.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Jenis Perkerasan deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Note**: This is a soft delete. The record will be marked as deleted but not removed from database.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
